Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with empty records value
Expected Result: API should return error with 400 status

Test Case Description: PUT: Update SPF/TXT record with empty records value
Expected Result: API should return error with 400 status

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with same domain name that already exists
Expected Result: API should return error - domain already exists

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with duplicate record values
Expected Result: API should return error for duplicate values

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with * wildcard subdomain
Expected Result: Record should be created successfully

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with @ root subdomain
Expected Result: Record should be created successfully

Test Case Description: Verify SPF/TXT record data pushed to named configuration file
Expected Result: Record should be present in named config

Test Case Description: Verify SPF/TXT record data has been pushed to the Windows server machine
Expected Result: Record data should be present on Windows DNS server

Test Case Description: Verify SPF/TXT record data has been pushed to the Linux server using dig
Expected Result: Record data should be resolvable via dig command

Test Case Description: POST: Create record with 255 characters in record value
Expected Result: Record should be created successfully with max length value

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF record with multiple values - SPF allows only single value
Expected Result: API should return 400 - SPF cannot have more than 1 record

Test Case Description: POST: Create TXT record with multiple record values - should be allowed
Expected Result: TXT record should accept multiple values successfully

Test Case Description: POST: Create @ root record for both SPF and TXT - only one type allowed
Expected Result: Second creation should return error - @ root already has record

Test Case Description: PUT: Update record TTL and remove records then add record back with PUT method
Expected Result: Record should be updated with new TTL and new records successfully

Test Case Description: POST: Create SPF/TXT record with lowercase then create same name in uppercase
Expected Result: API should return error - case insensitive duplicate not allowed
